title: penstemon metcalfei
intro: Penstemon metcalfei, also known as Metcalfe's penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon metcalfei include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Penstemon metcalfei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
